texto: He was one of those men whose constitutional inability to make small talk forfeits all one's sympathy and makes one think that social grace is sometimes a moral duty.

texto: I close my eyes, but my mind runs and runs. Tubes and fluids enter my body, but there's nothing to stop the anxiety. My heart pounds and sometimes I fear I'm on the cusp of crossing into whatever lies on the other side of sane.
explicacao: Citação de James Morris sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I close my eyes, but my mind runs and runs. Tubes and fluids enter my body, but there's nothing t…” articula reflexao, anxiety, close em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: I close my eyes, but my mind runs and runs. Tubes and fluids enter my body, but there's nothing to stop the anxiety. My heart pounds and sometimes I fear I'm on the cusp of crossing into whatever lies on the other side of sane.

texto: There was no outlet, my fear was so deep and tangible I couldn't scream. It felt like an actual substance that enveloped my body, my brain, my very being, I receded further and further within myself, a dark hole, my entire body a taut muscle.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a James Morris: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de enfrentar incertezas com ação. O trecho “There was no outlet, my fear was so deep and tangible I couldn't scream. It felt like an actual s…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, anxiety, further pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e reflexao-noturna.
